title: producer_champion pointer artifact (v1)
description: FROZEN cross-repo contract for config/producer_champion.json — the live pointer determining which entry-candidate producer arm the alpha-engine executor trades (config#2364 champion-promotion epic; seat swap alpha-engine-config-I2518 / epic I2515, 2026-07-14). Written by crucible-backtester optimizer/champion_promotion.py (gate engine, promotion_source='gate_engine') and, as a one-shot correction, by the 2026-07-13 operator bootstrap script THROUGH THE SAME writer function (promotion_source='operator_bootstrap') — never a hand-edited S3 object. Consumed by alpha-engine executor's executor/champion.py::load_champion_pointer at planner start: an S3 404/NoSuchKey there defaults to champion='scanner_predictor_direct' (the base-case arm since the I2518 seat swap); any OTHER read/parse error or an unrecognized `champion` value is fail-loud (ChampionPointerError) — this pointer must never silently resolve to an ambiguous trading state. Additive-only evolution: new `champion` arm values may be added over time but existing values are NEVER renamed or removed; renames/removals require a schema_version bump coordinated with the executor consumer (config#2366). 'agentic' is READ-TOLERATED in the enum below for historical continuity (no real pointer object was ever actually written with this value — it was only ever an implicit pre-bootstrap default — but audit-trail records and defensive read paths must never crash on it) but is WRITE-FORBIDDEN: crucible-backtester's VALID_CHAMPIONS no longer includes it, so write_champion_pointer raises on any attempt to write it.

champion.description: The live entry-candidate producer arm. 'agentic' = the RETIRED multi-agent research pipeline (config-I2518 seat swap, 2026-07-14) — read-tolerated, write-forbidden (see top-level description). 'scanner_predictor_direct' = the base-case champion: entries synthesized from the research-free predictor's outcome parquet, ranked by predicted_alpha (config#2366); live since 2026-07-13. 'thinktank_coverage' = the Think Tank challenger arm: entries synthesized from the Think Tank full-coverage top-~20 challenger-selection artifact (epic I2515). Additive: new arms may be appended in future schema versions, existing values are stable identifiers other systems (Metron Showcase Portfolio, this pointer's audit trail) key off of.

promoted_at.description: UTC ISO-8601 timestamp of the write that produced this exact pointer state (session timestamp, not a trading day — the pointer moves at most every few weeks).

promotion_source.description: Provenance of this pointer write. 'gate_engine' = written by the automated weekly gated promotion/demotion engine (optimizer/champion_promotion.py) after all gates passed. 'operator_bootstrap' = a human-ruled one-shot initial promotion (e.g. the 2026-07-13 bootstrap, Brian ruling config#2364), still routed through the same writer function and apply-audit path as the gate engine. Free-form beyond these two well-known values so future provenance sources remain representable without a schema bump (e.g. a manual operator override in an incident).
